title: acronychia endlicheri
intro: Acronychia endlicheri, also known as the native cherry or native plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acronychia endlicheri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
